scientific_scope: A new post-hoc diagnostic on burned fit tapes. It executes information placebos that the stopped state-rich fit did not run and reports two resource estimands without changing the stopped run's verdict.

placebo_inference.contrast: real-observation ReT minus placebo-observation ReT on paired burned tapes
placebo_inference.pass_rule: Every placebo in a family must have one-sided paired LCB95 strictly greater than zero.

fixed_clock_reserved.definition: Gross production slots, production quantity, charged dispatch slots, and charged downstream vehicle-hours are equal. Additional realized payload, departures, or vehicle-hours inside the fixed reserved envelope are utilization, not resource purchase.

pay_per_use.definition: Realized loaded departures, payload, and downstream vehicle-hours are resources. The policy must be non-superior to the best open-loop comparator and pass the globally matched actual-use frontier.

diagnostic_questions.total_observable_value: Does any frozen controller show stable value over open-loop when its complete real observation beats all total-information placebos?
diagnostic_questions.incremental_operational_state_value: Conditional on the current regime belief, does real operational state beat belief-only, stale-operational, and swapped-operational controls?
diagnostic_questions.incremental_belief_value: Conditional on current operational state, does the current belief beat neutral and stale-belief controls?
